## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Windows release or installer change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build, CI, or tooling
- [ ] Other

## Related Issues

Fixes/Closes/Refs #

## Test Plan

List the checks you ran.

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm format`
- [ ] `cargo fmt`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Manual test on Windows
- [ ] Not applicable

## Windows Impact

- [ ] No Windows-specific impact
- [ ] Tested on Windows 10
- [ ] Tested on Windows 11
- [ ] Affects installer, updater, signing, or release packaging
- [ ] May affect SmartScreen reputation or first-run trust prompts
- [ ] May require SignPath or certificate configuration review

## Screenshots or Recordings

Add screenshots, GIFs, or recordings for UI changes.

## Logs and Privacy

- [ ] I removed tokens, emails, account IDs, bucket names, paths containing personal data, and other sensitive values from logs.
- [ ] I did not include private signing, release, cloud, or CI secrets.
- [ ] I did not publicly disclose a security vulnerability. Security issues should be reported privately.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out risky areas, migration steps, follow-up work, or anything reviewers should prioritize.
